title: quercus macranthera subsp. macranthera
intro: Quercus macranthera subsp. macranthera, also known as the Asian evergreen oak or Macedonian oak, is a subspecies of evergreen tree belonging to the Quercus genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Quercus macranthera subsp. macranthera include its potential to alleviate conditions such as arthritis, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Herbal preparations of Quercus macranthera subsp. macranthera include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine, particularly in the regions where the plant is native.
